page.title: FAQ
page.subtitle: Quick answers to what people actually ask

items.a:
A Solana on-chain trading terminal.

· Non-custodial — your keys never leave your wallet
· Low fees — 0.2% (half what gmgn/bullx charge)
· Safety review — every token pre-checked via RugCheck + allowlist
· Open-source — frontend auditable on GitHub

Ocufi never touches your funds. Every trade is signed locally in your wallet (Phantom / Solflare / OKX) and broadcast directly to Solana.

No account, no custody — just your on-chain address.

Phantom or Solflare (native Solana wallets) work best.

OKX Web3 is supported but has minor compatibility limits with advanced Jupiter features.

items.q: Can I use it on mobile?
items.a:
Yes, but Safari / Chrome can't see wallet extensions on mobile.

The fix: open www.ocufi.io inside the Phantom or Solflare app's built-in browser. The homepage detects mobile and shows an "Open in Phantom" button for one-tap deeplink.
0.1% of the input SOL is sent to the Ocufi vault when you buy. Selling is currently free in V1 to avoid dust meme tokens piling up.

The max price deviation you accept between quote and execution.

Suggested: stables 0.5% / blue chips 1% / memes & pumps 3-5% (up to 10% for extremely thin liquidity).

Ocufi auto-suggests sane defaults by token type; you can override per trade.

Generic OKX fallback, not informative. Common causes:

1. Slippage too tight — raise to 5% or 10%
2. 100% sell balance race — Ocufi auto-leaves 0.1% dust
3. Not enough SOL for gas — keep ≥ 0.005 SOL
4. Pump.fun micro-liquidity
Jupiter requires ≥ $5 USD per order. No workaround in V1.

items.q: Why am I not getting notifications?
items.a:
V1 supports browser notifications only — must keep Ocufi tab open.

Backend scans prices every 60s, frontend syncs every 20s (max ~1 min delay).

Email & Web Push are planned for Day 12+ so you can be offline.

+10 points for each successful buy / sell / limit order.

Capped at 100 points per wallet per day (anti-abuse). Each tx counted once.

items.q: What can I do with points?
items.a:
V1: leaderboard only (social bragging rights).

V2 plans (TBD): fee discounts, raffles, airdrop whitelist, tier membership. Follow @Ocufi_io for updates.

items.q: Can Ocufi access my private key?
items.a:
Never. Ocufi only builds transaction data; signing happens entirely in your wallet app. Private keys never leave your wallet.

Frontend code is open-source — audit yourself at github.com/rowanrowan548-maker/ocufi-web

items.q: What does the safety review check?
items.a:
Ocufi integrates RugCheck + internal allowlist to show pre-trade:

· Top 10 holder concentration (>80% = dangerous)
· LP lock status (unlocked = rug risk)
· Mint authority (not renounced = can dilute you)
· Freeze authority (not renounced = can freeze your tokens)
· Age (less than 1 hour old = high risk)

Result condensed into 5-tier rating: verified / low / medium / high / critical.
Free to use. 0.1% of each trade covers platform costs. No subscription, no VIP, no ads.
